session.user:
Run the following commands in sequence and report results for each: 1. `uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/test_json_output.py tests/commands/one_shot/ -v` 2. `uv run ty check src/erk/cli/json_output.py src/erk/cli/ensure.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_remote_dispatch.py` 3. `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/json_output.py src/erk/cli/ensure.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_remote_dispatch.py tests/unit/cli/test_json_output.py tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_json.py tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_dispatch.py tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_remote_dispatch.py`
Report passes and failures for each. Do NOT fix any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run these commands in sequence and report the results for each.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest for json_output and one_shot tests

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 ============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 39 items

... [44 lines omitted] ...

session.assistant:
## Test Results Summary
**Command 1: pytest** - Status: FAILED - 1 test failure, 38 passed - Failure location: `tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_json.py::test_json_error_auth` - Error: `AssertionError: No JSON line found in output:` - The test expected a JSON response when an auth error occurs, but received empty output - The `_extract_json()` helper function found no JSON object in the output
**Command 2: ty (type checking)** - Status: PASSED - All checks passed - Files checked: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/json_output.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/ensure.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_remote_dispatch.py`
**Command 3: ruff (linting)** - Status: PASSED - All checks passed - Files checked: 8 source and test files across json_output, one_shot commands, and related tests
